returns.cre_: The address of the CRE contract.

returns.usdc_: The address of the USDC token contract.

returns.usdt_: The address of the USDT token contract.

returns.wbtc_: The address of the WBTC token contract.

returns.weth_: The address of the WETH token contract.

params.token: Token enum value representing the token to be used for payment.

returns.token_: The address of the chosen token's contract.

params.user: The address of the user whose payment information is being requested.

returns.userInfo_: A struct containing the user's last payment date and chosen token.

params.amounts: An array of uint256 values representing the amounts to be paid to each user, in USD.
params.users: An array of addresses representing the users to be paid.

CRE().notice: Returns the address of the CRE contract that is allowed to call the `pay` function.

USDC().notice: Returns the address of the USDC token contract.

USDT().notice: Returns the address of the USDT token contract.

WBTC().notice: Returns the address of the WBTC token contract.

WETH().notice: Returns the address of the WETH token contract.

choseToken(uint8).notice: Choses the token used for payment.

getUserInfo(address).notice: Returns the payment information for a given user.

pay(address[],uint256[]).notice: Executes payment to a list of users with corresponding amounts. Can only be called by the CRE contract.
